title: School Election 1995, National Study
description: "School Election 1995, National Study" is a national poll (telephone interview) conducted by Norsk Gallup Institutt AS on behalf of NSD – Norwegian Centre for Research Data (now Sikt - Norwegian Agency for Shared Services in Education and Research). The questions that are included in the poll are essentially the same as those offered to pupils in high school in the 1995 school election poll.
